name: frontend
description: This project now follows a clearer frontend layering model while still running in Flask templates.

scripts.build:legacy: esbuild src/js/core.js --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2017 --outfile=../static/dist-legacy/core.js && esbuild src/js/portal.js --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2017 --outfile=../static/dist-legacy/portal.js && esbuild src/js/admin_list.js --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2017 --outfile=../static/dist-legacy/admin_list.js && esbuild src/js/admin_edit.js --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2017 --outfile=../static/dist-legacy/admin_edit.js && esbuild src/js/admin_node_edit.js --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2017 --outfile=../static/dist-legacy/admin_node_edit.js && esbuild src/js/print.js --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2017 --outfile=../static/dist-legacy/print.js
